## Leagues of Votann

![][image1]

### Leagues of Votann Special Rules

**Eye of the Ancestors.** Whenever an enemy takes one of your non-ARTIFICIAL VOTANN models Out of Action, give that enemy 1 Grudge token. Any given model can have up to 2 Grudge tokens. Depending on how many Grudge tokens a model has, apply the following effects, which are cumulative.

* **1 Grudge Token.** Your VOTANN models have \+1 DICE to Hit that model with any of their attacks.  
* **2 Grudge Tokens.** Your VOTANN models have \+1 INJURY DICE that model with any of their attacks.

**Acquisitions.** Keep track of the amount of each of the following Resources you have: Raw Minerals, Biomatter, Energy Sources, and Galactic Intel. At the end of each battle, you earn an amount of resources based on the credit limit of that battle:

* **899 or lower:** D3x10  
* **900-1199:** D6x10  
* **1200-1499:** 2D6x10  
* **1500+:** 3D6x10

Roll a D6 to determine what type of resource you earn:

* **1\.** Raw Minerals  
* **2\.** Biomatter  
* **3\.** Energy Sources  
* **4\.** Galactic Intel  
* **5-6.** Resource of your choice

During any Trade step, you can spend Resources to purchase any of the following Assets, which permanently apply to your Warband. You can purchase each Asset only once.

* **Enhance Kindred Fleet (50 Raw Minerals, 50 Biomatter, 50 Energy Sources).** At the end of each battle, you gain an additional D3x10 Energy Sources. In addition, you gain the Circle Back Exploration Skill.  
* **Equip Prospectors (50 Raw Minerals, 50 Biomatter, 50 Energy Sources, 50 Galactic Intel).** Each time you roll to randomly determine a type of resource, you can roll two dice and choose one of the results to apply. In addition, you gain the Seek Exploration Skill.  
* **Establish Trade Routes (50 Raw Minerals, 50 Biomatter, X 50 Galactic Intel).** Once per quartermaster step, you can trade up to 30 of one type of Resource for the same amount of one other Resource. In addition, you can sell battlekit for full price.  
* **Expand Mining Operations (100 Biomatter, 100 Energy Sources).** At the end of each battle, you gain an additional D3x10 Raw Minerals. In addition, you gain the Extra Dice Exploration Skill.  
* **Honor Mercenary Contracts (50 Raw Minerals, 50 Biomatter, 50 Galactic Intel).** Whenever one of your Mercenaries is a casualty, you regain half of its Glory cost, rounded down.  
* **Maintain Core Systems (50 Raw Minerals, 50 Energy Sources, 100 Galactic Intel).** At the end of each battle, you gain an additional D3x10 Galactic Intel. In addition, you gain the Careful Exploration Skill.  
* **Settle Kindred Colony (50 Raw Minerals, 100 Biomatter, 50 Energy Sources).** At the end of each battle, you gain an additional D3x10 Biomatter. In addition, you gain the Duplicate Exploration Skill.  
* **Supply the Guilds (100 Raw Minerals, 50 Biomatter, 50 Energy Sources).** At the end of each battle, you earn D6x10 credits.

### Leagues of Votann Patrons

Your patron can be an Ancestor Core or a Guildmaster.

#### Patron: Ancestor Core

* **A Long List.** When this model takes an enemy that has one or more Grudge tokens Out of Action, you can give a Grudge token to any other enemy it can see, either within 18” of it or within 6” of the enemy model.  
* **Ancestral Power (Psyker Only).** The range of all of this model’s psychic powers is increased by 6”.  
* **Bequest of the Votann.** At the beginning of the battle, select any one Success Roll (aside from a Charge or a standard Melee/Ranged Attacks) by any enemy model. This Success Roll cannot target, affect or damage the Rightfully Guided model in any way.  
* **Grim Demeanor.** This model and its VOTANN allies within 12” of it ignore the FEAR Keyword of enemies.  
* **Kinbond.** This model may form a FIRETEAM with any one non-ELITE model of the Warband. In addition, the first time either model fails a Risky Success Roll during a Fireteam Activation, the Activation does not end.  
* **Warrior Lord.** Injury rolls caused by the melee attacks of this model cannot have \-DICE applied to them.

#### Patron: Guildmaster

* **Ancestral Bearing.** This model’s Actions, Abilities, and psychic powers can treat its allies as if they were 3” closer than they are.  
* **Experienced Eye.** The cost of any suit of armour or equipment worth 15 credits or more is reduced by 5 credits if the model with this skill is part of the Warband. This does not stack.  
* **Guild Affiliate.** At the end of each battle, you earn an additional D6x10 credits.  
* **Luck Has. Need Keeps. Toil Earns.** This model has \+1 DICE to all Success Rolls specific to the current mission, it counts as two models for the purpose of counting how many models you have within a certain location, and it counts as being worth 50 more credits for the purposes of any VP you earn. Finally, while this model is on the battlefield and not Down, it counts as an additional model for the purpose of morale (but it is not counted as 2 for your starting number of models).  
* **Master Armourer.** This model’s armour increases by \-1 if it is wearing any armour at all. This does not stack with shields.  
* **Unrelenting Toil.** This model has \+1 DICE to all Success Rolls besides attacks, Dash, or using psychic powers.

### Leagues of Votann Unique Battlekit

#### Leagues of Votann Unique Ranged Weapons

* **EtaCarn Plasma Beamer.** 18”, ASSAULT, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, TWO-HANDED  
* **EtaCarn Plasma Gun.** 24”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, TWO-HANDED  
* **Ion Blaster.** 18”, \+1 INJURY DICE, TWO-HANDED  
* **Iron Ambassador.** 24”, AUTOMATIC 3, ASSAULT, RISKY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Volkanite Disintegrator.** 18”, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, CRITICAL, FIRE, TWO-HANDED

#### Leagues of Votann Unique Pistols

* **EtaCarn Plasma Pistol.** 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, PISTOL  
* **Ion Pistol.** 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, PISTOL, MAIN HAND ONLY

#### Leagues of Votann Unique Heavy Ranged Weapons

* **Heavy Volkanite Disintegrator.** 24”, CRITICAL, FIRE, HEAVY, IGNORE ARMOUR, TWO-HANDED  
* **Ion Beamer.** 18”, \+1 INJURY DICE, BLAST 2”, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Magna Rail Rifle.** 18”, \+2 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED  
* **SP Conversion Beamer.** 24”, IGNORE LONG RANGE, CRITICAL, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, VICIOUS 10 when firing at Long Range

#### Leagues of Votann Unique Melee Weapons

* **Concussion Gauntlet.** Melee, STUN, MAIN HAND ONLY. If the wielder hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line D3” directly away from the wielder.  
* **Heavy Concussion Gauntlet.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY, STUN, MAIN HAND ONLY. If the wielder hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line D3+1” directly away from the wielder.  
* **Twin Concussion Gauntlets.** Melee, \+1 DICE, CUMBERSOME, STUN, TWO-HANDED. If the wielder hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line D3” directly away from the wielder.  
* **Twin Heavy Concussion Gauntlets.** Melee, \+1 DICE, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, CUMBERSOME, HEAVY, STUN, TWO-HANDED. If the wielder hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line D3+1” directly away from the wielder.

#### Leagues of Votann Unique Thrown Weapons

* **Throwing Plasma Knives.** 8”, IGNORE LONG RANGE, ASSAULT, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, THROWN

#### Leagues of Votann Equipment

* **Ancestral Crest.** The equipped model begins each battle with 2 BLESSING MARKERS.  
* **Exoarmour Grenade Launcher.** The range of Frag Grenades and Krak Grenades the equipped model attacks with is increased by 4”.  
* **Grey Crest.** Attacks made against the wearer have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Mass Driver Accelerators.** When this model charges, roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 and then add the highest of the two dice to their charge move.  
* **Multispectral Visor.** The model ignores penalties to its attack Success Rolls besides Cover, Long Range, and BLOOD MARKERS (including INFECTION and STUN), as well as penalties or limits to the range of its ranged weapons.  
* **Preymark Crest.** This model and each friendly VOTANN model within 6” of it ignore Long Range penalties when making ranged attacks. Counts as Headgear.  
* **Rampart Crest.** Injury rolls made against the wearer have \-1 DICE. Counts as Headgear.  
* **Rollbar Searchlight.** This model ignores penalties for attacking at Long Range with its ranged weapons.  
* **Weavefield Crest.** The wearer and each of its allies within 6” of it treat Down Injury results as Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Teleport Crest.** The model gains the DEEP STRIKE Keyword. Counts as Headgear.

### Leagues of Votann Campaign Shop

During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.

* **Captive Abyss (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** 6”, \+1 INJURY DICE per Grudge Token the target has, BLAST 3”, SCATTER, can be used only once per battle.  
* **Exactor (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, IGNORE ARMOUR on a Critical Hit, CRITICAL, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, TWO-HANDED  
* **Forgestar (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** 18”, AUTOMATIC 3, ASSAULT, CRITICAL, PISTOL  
* **Grudge’s End (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** At the start of each battle, choose one Boltgun or Bolt Pistol the equipped model is wielding. Until the end of the battle, that weapon has \+1 INJURY DICE and ARMOUR PIERCING 1 against an enemy with at least 1 Grudge Token.  
* **Kâhyrm’s War Plate (7 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** Counts as Power Armour, providing \-2 to Injury rolls. The equipped model gains the TOUGH Keyword.  
* **Murmuring Stave (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, PSYCHIC, HELD, choose a power from the Skeinwrought Discipline that costs 5 credits when you purchase the stave. The bearer can use that power as if it knew it. In addition, if it is the chosen power, the first psychic power the equipped model uses during each of its Activations does not count towards the Using Multiple Powers rules.  
* **Recyc Converter (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Whenever the equipped model takes an enemy model Out of Action with a Volkanite Disintegrator, Forgestar, Ion Blaster, or Grav Gun, you gain Resources depending on the the enemy:  
  * TOUGH and not VEHICLE: 20 Biomatter  
  * VEHICLE: 20 Raw Material  
  * Neither of the above: 10 Biomatter  
  * Worth any Glory: 20 Energy Sources (in addition to above)  
* **Thyrikite Plate (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Armour).** \-3 to Injury rolls.  
* **Wârpestryk (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Deep Strike Only).** Once during each of its Activations, when the equipped model moves, it can teleport, ignoring all terrain and models in between it and its destination.  
* **Wayfarer’s Grace (3 Glory, Elite Only).** At the start of each of its Activations, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the equipped model.

### Skeinwrought Psychic Discipline

* **Ancestral Wrath (5 credits, Attack).** 24”, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER for each Grudge token the target has, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Fortify (5 credits, Effect).** 12”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, the target has \-1 INJURY MODIFIER, stacking with armour and shields up to \-3.  
* **Crushing Contempt (5 credits, Effect).** 12”, One Enemy, Target Activation, the target has \-1 DICE to all Success Rolls per Grudge token it has.  
* **Grimnyr’s Regard (5 credits, Effect).** 12”, One Ally, Immediate, the target can immediately move up to 3”. This movement can take the model into close combat, but counts as a Retreat if it moves out of melee. If the target is Down, it first stands up.  
* **Grudgepyre (2 Glory, Attack).** 18”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, BLAST 2”, FIRE, PSYCHIC, RISKY, \+1 INJURY DICE per Grudge Marker a target has.  
* **Null Vortex (5 credits, Effect).** 24”, Point, End of Turn, place a Vortex token at the target. \-DICE applied to Injury rolls from any source are ignored against enemy models within 3” of the Vortex Marker. Remove the marker at the end of the Turn.

### Leagues of Votann Elites

#### 1 Kâhl (Cost: 55 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Kâhl | 5”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Kâhl can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Leagues of Votann Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Grim Efficiency.** As an Action that does not require any roll, the Kâhl can give one enemy model it can see within 18” 1 Grudge Token.  
* **Heavily Armoured.** The first \-1 of the Kâhl’s Armour, if any, has IMPERVIOUS.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, LARGE, LEADER, TOUGH, VOTANN

#### 0-1 Brôkhyr Iron-Master (Cost: 45 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Brôkhyr Iron-Master | 5”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Brôkhyr Iron-Master can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Leagues of Votann Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Brôkhyr’s Guild.** As an Action with a Success Roll, the Brôkhyr Iron-Master can attempt to repair itself or a friendly ARTIFICIAL or VEHICLE model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.  
* **Heavily Armoured.** The first \-1 of the Brôkhyr Iron-Master’s Armour, if any, has IMPERVIOUS.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, VOTANN

#### 0-1 Grimnyr (Cost: 55 Credits \+cost of weapon and powers)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Grimnyr | 5”/Flying | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Grimnyr can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Leagues of Votann Armoury. It must be equipped with exactly one PSYCHIC weapon.

The Grimnyr may purchase up to three powers from the Skeinwrought Psychic Discipline, and must purchase at least one.

**Abilities**

* **Heavily Armoured.** The first \-1 of the Grimnyr’s Armour, if any, has IMPERVIOUS.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FLYING, LARGE, PSYKER 1, VOTANN

### Troops

#### Hearthkyn (Cost: 25 Credits \+cost of armour)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Hearthkyn | 5”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Hearthkyn must be equipped with armour of some kind (not counting shields). It can otherwise be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Leagues of Votann Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Heavily Armoured.** The first \-1 of the Hearthkyn’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.

**Keywords**  
VOTANN

#### 0-4 Cthonian Beserk (Cost: 40 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Cthonian Beserk | 5”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Cthonian Beserk can be equipped with any weapons or equipment from the Leagues of Votann Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Cyberstimms.** When this model is taken Out of Action, before removing it from the table, it can make a single melee attack against an enemy it is in close combat with. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on this attack's Success Roll.  
* **Rage.** Injury rolls against the Cthonian Beserk have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
STRONG, VOTANN

#### 0-3 Einhyr Hearthguard (Cost: 45 Credits \+40 for armour)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Einhyr Hearthguard | 5”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
An Einhyr Hearthguard must be equipped with Power Armour, included in its cost and its statistics above. It can be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment from the Leagues of Votann Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Decisive Destruction.** The Hearthguard has \+1 DICE to Hit with ranged attacks made against the closest possible target.  
* **Heavily Armoured.** The first \-1 of the Hearthguard’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.  
* **Oathband Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Einhyr Hearthguard is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Einhyr Hearthguard instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Einhyr Hearthguard.

**Keywords**  
VOTANN

#### 0-2 Brôkhyr Thunderkyn (Cost: 45 Credits \+40 for armour)

You may include 0-3 Brôkhyr Thunderkynin in a Warband worth 1200 credits or more.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Brôkhyr Thunderkyn | 5”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | \-2 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
An Brôkhyr Thunderkyn must be equipped with Power Armour, included in its cost and its statistics above. It can be equipped with any other weapons or equipment from the Leagues of Votann Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Breaching Fire.** When the Brôkhyr Thunderkyn hits with a ranged attack with a HEAVY weapon, the target cannot benefit from Cover until the end of the current Turn.  
* **Heavily Armoured.** The first \-1 of the Brôkhyr Thunderkyn’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.  
* **Heavy Gunner.** The Brôkhyr Thunderkyn can ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one ranged weapon it carries.

**Keywords**  
LARGE, VEHICLE, VOTANN

#### 0-1 Ironkin Steeljack (Cost: 115 Credits)

You can include 0-2 Ironkin Steeljacks in your Warband if you do not include any Hernkyn Pioneers.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ironkin Steeljack | 5”/Infantry | \+1 | \+2 | \-3 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
An Ironkin Steeljack is equipped with heavy armour plating, included in its cost and its statistics above. It can be equipped with any other weapons or equipment from the Leagues of Votann Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Heavily Armoured.** The first \-1 of the Ironkin Steeljack’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.  
* **Merciless Eradication.** When an enemy in close combat with the Ironkin Steeljack Retreats, the Ironkin Steeljack has \+1 DICE to Hit and \+1 INJURY DICE for its free attack against that model.  
* **Purge Response.** Once during each Turn, when an enemy model ends its movement within 6” of the Ironkin Steeljack, the Ironkin Steeljack can make a single ranged attack against that enemy.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, LARGE, STRONG, VOTANN

#### 0-1 Hernkyn Pioneer (Cost: 135 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Hernkyn Pioneer | 8”/Flying | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 90 x 52mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Hernkyn Pioneer is equipped with heavy armour plating, included in its cost and its statistics above. It can be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment from the Leagues of Votann Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Heavily Armoured.** The first \-1 of the Hernkyn Pioneer’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.  
* **Weapon Mount.** The Hernkyn Pioneer can ignore the HEAVY property of one ranged weapon it wields.

**Keywords**  
FLYING, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, SKIRMISHER, VEHICLE, TOUGH, VOTANN

### Leagues of Votann Mercenaries

You can recruit the following mercenaries:

* 0-1 Arkanyst Evaluator (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-2 CORV (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-3 E-COG (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Hernkyn Jaegir (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Hernkyn Riflekyn (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Squat Exo-Driller (Cost: 5 Glory)
